phrases.text: The Leafpup eyes you warily. What will you do?

You toss a Silver Spirit Orb! The Leafpup spins... (60% success).
You toss a Gold Spirit Orb! The Leafpup spins... (85% success).
You toss a Master Spirit Orb! The Leafpup is captured! (100% success).

The Leafpup watches as you walk away.

Welcome, trainer! I am Professor Astraea. The Astral Beasts of these 9 regions need a champion brave enough to catch and evolve them all!
There are 270 Astral Beasts spread across 9 regions. Each has 3 evolutionary forms. Catch them, evolve them, and face the champions!
Use Spirit Orbs — the Elder sells them. Higher-tier beasts need better orbs. Talk to the beast and choose to catch it.
Bring your beast and a fee to the Evolution Scholar. Higher evolutions cost more.
Base to Mid: 100 gold. Mid to Final: 300 gold.
Then go! I'll track your progress. Catch all 270 to earn the title of Astral Master!
Good luck, trainer!
Welcome to the Evolution Study. I can evolve your Astral Beasts — for a fee.
Bring me the beast's Spirit Token and 100 gold, and I will trigger the evolution.
300 gold and the beast's mid-form token. The final form is truly magnificent.
Return any time you're ready to evolve.
Greetings, young trainer. I sell Spirit Orbs and healing supplies for your journey.
Basic (50g): 30% catch on base forms. Silver (150g): 60%. Gold (300g): 85%. Master (1000g): 100%.
Minor Heal (20g), Heal (50g), Major Heal (100g), Defense (60g), Swiftness (70g), Antidote (40g).
May your orbs fly true!
Welcome to the Breeding Chamber! Bring me two Astral Beasts and I'll create something new — and powerful!
You sacrifice two beasts (their tokens). The result is a random hybrid from 30 possible breeds. No guarantees — but all hybrids are mighty!
